titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chairman of the American Delegation ( (Hull), ), on Board the S. S. “Santa Clara”

div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chairman of the American Delegation ( Hull ), on Board the S. S. “Santa Clara”
div.p:
16. My No. 12, December 1, 7 p.m.Not printed. The Brazilian Ambassador called to see me this afternoon with a further message from Aranha. Aranha has received a message from Cantilo of a conciliatory character indicating that he will try to reach an agreement with the Brazilians before making his address at the conference. Aranha, while gratified, is nevertheless sending instructions to Mello FrancoAfranio de Mello Franco, Chairman of the Brazilian delegation. to insist that the Argentines accept the Brazilian point of view. It would
seem to me probable that you would wish immediately after arrival in Lima to confer with the Argentine and Brazilian delegates with a view to seeking some common ground for understanding. The situation as it is developing reminds me very much of the situation which existed during the first days of the Buenos Aires Conference.
